creator: petef@databits.net
text:
++ 14/05/01 20:57 -0700 - okazaki@FreeBSD.org:
| Synopsis: Request upgrade of libtool to 1.4 in /usr/ports/devel

From devel/libtool/Makefile:

# This port has not been upgraded to 1.3.5 because it makes no changes to
# FreeBSD support, and would require that all Ports users upgrade for no
# reason.

I'd guess that's why it hasn't been updated to 1.4.  If you have patches to
the port and a good reason why it should be updated, I'm sure it will
get committed... otherwise this PR should probably be closed.

-pete

--
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
